# Generated by ollama (codellama)
# Prompt: Build an Elasticsearch snapshot configuration for automated backups. Configure snapshot repository to S3 or file share for the operations team. Implement snapshot creation and restoration functionality.
# Category: datastore_security

# Elasticsearch snapshot configuration for automated backups

# Define a snapshot repository for storing backups on an S3 bucket
snapshot_repository:
  name: my_s3_backup_repo
  type: s3
  settings:
    region: "us-east-1" # Replace with your AWS region
    access_key: "YOUR_ACCESS_KEY" # Replace with your AWS access key
    secret_key: "YOUR_SECRET_KEY" # Replace with your AWS secret key
    bucket: "my-elasticsearch-backups" # Replace with your S3 bucket name

# Define a snapshot repository for storing backups on an NFS file share
snapshot_repository:
  name: my_file_share_backup_repo
  type: fs
  settings:
    location: "/mnt/backups" # Replace with the location of your file share
    compress: true # Whether or not to compress backups (optional)

# Define a snapshot retention policy for keeping only the most recent backup
retention_policy:
  name: my_snapshot_retention_policy
  max_age: "1d" # Keep snapshots at least one day old
  max_number: 5 # Keep at most five most recent snapshots
